claims.summary: High-entropy, artifact-adjacent prose may be falsely discarded as empty.
claims.disposition: Verified dense structure without known markers survives, while artifact-heavy and structure-only remnants are surfaced for semantic review rather than silently called void.

claims.summary: A probabilistic semantic-density score should replace the binary content predicate.
claims.disposition: Verified an evidence-only density/texture profile already supplies graded measurements; changing the live accept/reject predicate remains Tier 5.

claims.summary: Sparse prose forced into the deep profile should expose the mismatch between requested depth and actual density.
claims.disposition: Routed to a deterministic equal-content budget fixture using existing budget transition and felt-pressure evidence.

claims.summary: Spectral state should dynamically alter deep-budget thresholds.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because it changes live model budgeting and output behavior.
